results.mimo_latex:
\begin{tikzpicture}
    \begin{axis}[
        axis lines=left,
        xlabel={real axis},
        ylabel={imaginary axis},
        zlabel={},
        xmin=-1, xmax=3,
        ymin=-1, ymax=1,
        zmin=0, zmax=1,
        view={120}{25},
        grid=major,
        width=10cm,
        height=8cm
    ]
        % 绘制球体
        \addplot3[
            surf,
            shader=flat,
            draw=black,
            fill=white,
            domain=0:180,
            y domain=0:360,
            samples=20,
            samples y=20,
            z buffer=sort
        ]
        ({sin(x)*cos(y)}, {sin(x)*sin(y)}, {cos(x)});
        
        % 绘制底部的螺旋线
        \addplot3[
            thick,
            black,
            domain=0:10*pi,
            samples=200,
            samples y=0,
            z buffer=sort
        ]
        ({0.5*cos(deg(x))}, {0.5*sin(deg(x))}, {0.1 - 0.01*x});
        
        % 绘制底部的椭圆
        \addplot3[
            thick,
            black,
            domain=0:360,
            samples=100,
            samples y=0,
            z buffer=sort
        ]
        ({2 + 1.5*cos(deg(x))}, {0.8*sin(deg(x))}, {0});
    \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
